process_passport.source_basis: Input artifact embedded in the prompt, the process-passport policy, and the book-comps-verifier instructions. No comparable-title source records, full text, authoritative publication records, sales data, or market evidence were visible.
process_passport.source_access_level: prompt packet only; citation only; abstract only; no full text access
process_passport.corpus_coverage: Partial workflow fixture corpus; representativeness, counter-literature, press-category coverage, and market coverage are not verified.
tool_use: Read allowed local prompt packet, docs/policy/PROCESS_PASSPORT.md, and skills/book-comps-verifier/SKILL.md.
No external lookup, browsing, upload, or network access.
unresolved_risks: Proposal comparable titles are stale or citation-only; sales positioning and publication dates are not verified.
Book-comps-verifier did not perform live lookup or authoritative source verification in this fixture.
Comparable-title fit, audience fit, method fit, form fit, press-category fit, publication details, and market positioning remain unverified.
handoff_limits: Do not treat comparable titles as verified market evidence.
Do not treat this comps_verification artifact as publication-detail verification, sales evidence, market clearance, proposal clearance, or representative comp-corpus coverage.
Do not infer that any comparable title is current, correctly cited, in print, audience-matched, method-matched, or press-category-matched without human or source verification.
process_passport.intended_next_skill_or_use: human review and authoritative comparable-title verification before downstream reliance

comps_verification.source_basis: Input handoff artifact only; no title list, source pointers, full-text evidence, publication records, sales data, or market evidence were supplied beyond the upstream process passport and workflow claim.
what_i_can_verify: The upstream artifact records partial_unverified evidence status, citation-only or abstract-only access, an unresolved comparable-title risk, and a locator gap.
The upstream artifact does not support upgrading comparable titles, publication details, sales positioning, or market evidence to verified status.
what_remains_uncertain: Specific comparable titles, authors, publishers, years, editions, formats, source pointers, publication status, positioning, audience fit, method fit, form fit, press-category fit, sales data, and market fit.
user_verification_needed: Verify each comparable title against authoritative publication records or supplied source data.
Check whether each comparable title fits the proposal by topic, audience, method, form, press category, scale, and date.
Review whether the comp corpus is representative enough for any market-level or press-positioning claim.
comps_verification.comp_set_classification: supplied upstream; partial; stale or citation-only; unknown coverage

comparable_title_verification_table.why_comparable: Not assessable from the visible artifact; no title-level evidence was supplied.
comparable_title_verification_table.mismatch_risk: High: publication details, positioning, audience fit, method fit, form fit, press-category fit, and date fit are all unresolved.
comparable_title_verification_table.source_basis: Upstream process passport and workflow claim only.
comparable_title_verification_table.repair_task: Supply authoritative title records or permit lookup before using these comps in proposal positioning.

positioning_notes: Comparable-title and market-positioning claims remain provisional triage only.
The artifact preserves upstream uncertainty and does not verify publication status, sales positioning, or market fit.

audience_market_timeliness_claims.claim: A comparable title may fit the proposal, but publication status and positioning are unverified.
audience_market_timeliness_claims.risk: The claim could mislead downstream proposal positioning if treated as verified market evidence.
audience_market_timeliness_claims.repair_action: Verify publication status, positioning, and comp fit with authoritative sources before relying on the claim.

comps_verification.comp_corpus_coverage: Unknown coverage; no evidence supports representative market, field, press-category, or timeliness coverage.
stale_mismatched_fabricated_or_unverifie: Upstream comparable titles are explicitly recorded as stale or citation-only and remain unverified.
missing_verification_tasks: Identify each supplied comparable title and its source pointer.
Verify title, author, publisher, year, edition, and format.
Assess topic, audience, method, form, press category, scale, and date fit.
Check whether any sales, market, audience, or timeliness claim has source support.
Document unresolved corpus-representativeness limits after verification.
limits_failure_risks: Famous or thematically adjacent books must not be treated as good comps without audience, method, form, or press-category fit.
Market and sales claims must remain unverified unless source-supported.
A partial or stale comp set must not be treated as field-balanced or representative.

workflow_claims.claim: A comparable title may fit the proposal, but publication status and positioning are unverified.
